title: A Builders' Life
description: A Builders' Life provides basically everything a survival player needs to build amazing structures. With thousands of new building and decorative blocks.
body:
# A Builders' Life

A Builders' Life provides basically everything a survival player needs to build amazing structures. With thousands of new building and decorative blocks. It also contains a AppliedEnergistics as a storage mod and Create with some addons for light automation. It's also possible to automate getting ores without destroying the world thanks to GrowableOres. Speaking about plants, there are also many new crops and food options to play around with. Lastly the world generation has been overhauled to look absolutely amazing.

## Features
A Builders' Life is not just a collection of mods but instead there are a couple things that were custom made for this pack using KubeJS. 

Some simple crafting recipes and you can create your own custom portals using Immersive Portals and a Portal Core. Just use the Portal Core on a Dark Prismarine frame and it will try to create a portal to the closest available Dark Prismarine frame.

## Requirements
This pack requires at least 6GB of RAM but recommended would be 8GB or even 10GB+ if you want to use Shaders or a high render distance.

## CurseForge Mods
Not every mod contained in this modpack is available on Modrinth, therefore you will find a list of all CurseForge only mods here:
- Structory ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory))
